name: El Campo Lost Lagoon
description: Come play pickleball at El Campo Lost Lagoon in El Campo, TX! There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private. Amenities include lights, water, and restrooms. You can’t reserve the court.
fees: Private — Must buy a day pass. $25 Summer Season (Includes access to water park, slides and all other amenities) $10 Winter Season!
